\tzpentry{ID3490}{Curvature Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3490 introduces Curvature Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathrm{Ra}=\frac{g\beta\Delta T\,L^3}{\nu\kappa}, \]
